---
title: "Research Assistant Intern"
description: "Collected, cleaned, and validated spatial datasets to support GIS-based risk assessment and land-use planning."
org: "USDA Agricultural Research Service"
org-url: "https://www.ars.usda.gov/plains-area/miles-city-mt/larrl/"
date: "2023-05-01"
dates: "May 2023 – Aug 2023"
location: "Miles City, MT"
categories: [Experience]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://www.ars.usda.gov/plains-area/miles-city-mt/larrl/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">USDA Agricultural Research Service</a> · May 2023 – Aug 2023 · Miles City, MT
:::

At the USDA Agricultural Research Service's Livestock and Range Research Laboratory, I supported GIS-based risk assessment and land-use planning on rangeland systems.

- Collected, cleaned, and validated spatial datasets for downstream analysis.
- Supported GIS-based risk assessment and land-use planning workflows.
- Contributed field and geospatial data to ongoing rangeland research.
